name: Rice Salad with Dill and Baby Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces baby carrots, trimmed halved lengthwise
8 ounces baby zucchini, or baby pattypan squash, ends trimmed, then halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch carrots in a large pot of boiling salted water for 1 minute.
2. Add zucchini and cook for an additional 1 minute.
3. Using a slotted spoon, transfer vegetables to a colander and rinse under cold water; drain well.
4. Return rice to the pot of boiling water and cook until tender, about 15 minutes.
5. Drain rice and rinse under cold water; drain well. Cool to room temperature.
6. Mix rice, carrots, and zucchini in a large bowl.
7. Add yogurt, chopped dill, vinegar, and oil. Toss to coat.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste (can be prepared up to 6 hours ahead, cover and refrigerate).
9. Garnish with fresh dill sprigs if desired.
